pricing.refundPolicy: Second chance reset available on Standard Challenge only. No refunds after trading begins.

payouts.schedule: 3 to 21 days between payouts (adjustable via add-on)

rules.consistencyRule: 3 profitable trading days required with profit/loss of 0.5% of account size (Flash Challenge). Risk limit of no more than half of daily loss limit on a single asset on the same day. Lot size changes monitored for consistency compliance.
rules.notes: News trading allowed but no opening or closing positions during high-impact news windows. Weekend holding available as paid add-on at challenge selection. Weekend trading only with add-on. Copy trading permitted only between your own accounts — no social platform mirroring. EAs and automated trading allowed on MT5 but HFT, latency arbitrage, hedging, and micro scalping banned. Martingale allowed but not with over-leveraging or shared EAs. Account sharing, account rolling, and IP sharing strictly forbidden. Switching accounts mid-challenge not allowed. Scalping allowed only with add-on (positions must be held 30+ seconds). Payments accepted via cards, PayPal, bank transfers, wire transfers, and crypto (max $500 via Confirmo.net). Registered in Saint Lucia. Broker connectivity through Purple Trading (CySEC-regulated). MT5 and TradeLocker restricted in US, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Libya, North Korea, Syria, Somalia, Algeria, Crimea, Donetsk, and Luhansk regions.

markets.instruments: Forex (50-70+ pairs, 1:30 base, 1:50 or 1:100 with add-ons), Indices (10-15+, 1:30 base), Metals (5-10+, 1:30 base), Commodities (5-15+, 1:30 base), Crypto CFDs (10-30+, 1:30 base), Stock CFDs (100-150+, 1:30 base), Futures CFDs (50-100+). All leverage adjustable to 1:50 (+10% fee) or 1:100 (+20% fee).

notableFlags: Not backed by a regulated broker directly
Broker connectivity through Purple Trading (CySEC-regulated EU broker)
Mixed public perception — favorable Trustpilot but payout complaints on other platforms
Restricted in US, Canada, and several other countries
